title: Introducing Lip Master 2 elearning: Advanced Techniques in Augmentation & Restoration
filename: Introducing Lip Master 2 elearning： Advanced Techniques in Augmentation & Restoration.en.vtt
excerpt: Welcome to lip masters - is different to other courses this course is designed to deliver real outcomes for your practice the purpose is to upgrade your understanding to an expert level through detailed explanations of key concepts and Anatomy product science techniques and compl…

segments.text: welcome to lip masters - is different to other courses this course is designed to deliver real outcomes for your practice the purpose is to upgrade your understanding to an expert level through detailed explanations of key concepts and Anatomy product science techniques and complications you should see three important impacts on your practice firstly I want you to learn how to consult your patients in a way that makes them rapidly see you as an expert capable of giving them the expert guidance they crave you should see a surgeon your skills of treatment design product choice and technique enabling you to deliver the result they need the fewest side-effects possible you should develop a deep understanding of the anatomy and the interaction of the structures of the lower face with different dermal fillers this will take you way beyond the one filler one technique approach and help you become a master of choosing the best combinations of techniques and products to get the

results your clients really want I will reveal the actual practical steps you can take to ethically increase income for your business through building trust your range of services and your expertise the biggest difference with lip masters is of the videos and training materials in this course are not the most important features as part of the package you can join other trainees on a closed Facebook group for further support and mentoring I use this network to improve the course you have already purchased allowing the course you bought to be upgraded around your needs in lit masters 2.0 we have significantly upgraded the program thanks to the ideas of the first cohort of delegates I'm now thrilled to include six more modules including complication management of lumps and lips and emergency reversal protocol videos including a real-life case study as well as stages of the consultation and use of the golden mean calipers all of this content and future upgrades are yours to keep forever this is not one of those courses that gets

taken away from you after a year it's yours and it keeps getting better this is why everyone who takes this course will also be invited to a secret Facebook group for a period of coaching I want to make sure that you can execute on what you've learned and thrive in 2018 I'll be looking for ways to make this course better every year so let's take a detailed look at what is covered in lit masters too broadly the course covers four key domains scientific theory the latest practical techniques consultation skills and complication management it also touches on marketing and business strategy along the way in detail part one is about the mindset in the consultation and how this becomes your competitive edge when you realize what clients really want I cover key ways you should understand the market to help you clarify in your mind your business strategy and inform your marketing and content and consultation skills to be an expert you must understand the science of beauty so we covered the

rules ratios and details that make up beauty and how to explain this to your clients to skyrocket the trust that they have in you the consultation and consent process is covered as well as new and detailed breakdown of the stages of the consultation to make it clearer in your mind how to connect and communicate in a highly effective way with clients of course the core of this course is the technique section here I share six different procedures and analyze how they are different and can be selected to achieve specific results in each case we look at how to reduce trauma and the risk of complications you will enjoy a close up look at the modified tensing procedure mixing products for the best possible results and a detailed look at restoration beautification augmentation and external rotation of the red lip as well as restoration of the white lip using several techniques all our close-up videos with animated explanations to help you really visualize what's going on in the complications section I'm pleased

to include a video detailing the key contents of an emergency reversal kit that you should keep in your clinic we include two case studies when elected reversal is carried out and video footage of how to prepare and execute a reversal I'm now very happy to include a very important and detailed instructional video on how to diagnose the presence and the scale of impending necrosis caused by a vascular occlusion so that you can more confidently either reassure and discharge or plan an emergency reversal procedure yourself of course we then go on to demonstrate the detailed steps of an emergency reversal so you can see how the protocol is executed and pick up practical steps on how to reduce anxiety and medical-legal risk in this high-stress situation I'm also able to share rare video footage of a real vent vascular occlusion that I saw and treated in my own clinic so you can live through a real scenario and see what needs to be done to keep patients safe as well as vascular emergencies I'm also pleased to be able to include three lectures on how to interrogate understand and treat lumps and lips one

of the most anxiety producing areas for practitioners including precise tips on when to wait when to reassure and when to actively treat your patient at the end of this process you can test your knowledge and validate your learning through a quiz which will ensure you understand things properly overall I think you will find this course dramatically improves your knowledge confidence and skill and provides all you need to make a step change in the development of your business and your clinical skills you also have the continuing reassurance of ongoing support and free future upgrades thanks for watching I hope to see you on the other side [Music]
